title: McCarthy Tétrault fortifies its transactional, Infrastructure, and Renewable Energy Expertise with New Partner Lévy Bazinet
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault fortifies its transactional, Infrastructure, and Renewable Energy Expertise with New Partner Lévy Bazinet
McCarthy Tétrault welcomes Lévy Bazinet as a partner in the firm’s Business Law Group in Montréal. Lévy is a seasoned dealmaker with over 18 years of experience in mergers and acquisitions, project development, and asset management in the infrastructure and renewable energy sectors.
Lévy has experience managing complex transactions and projects across multiple sectors, including Canada’s dynamic infrastructure and renewable energy space. He has facilitated the acquisition and sale of infrastructure and renewable energy assets in North America and Europe and negotiated key partnership agreements with various stakeholders. In project development, Lévy has overseen the legal aspects of diverse infrastructure, renewable energy and real estate projects, including the handling of partnerships and financing negotiations.
Lévy’s in-house counsel experience gives him unique insight into the day-to-day challenges that clients face and puts him in an excellent position to advise our clients on their most important matters.
“Lévy’s impressive track record in managing complex transactions and overseeing major development projects will make him an invaluable asset to our team,” said Éric Gosselin, Partner, and National Business Law Practice Group Leader. “His deep expertise in renewable energy projects, coupled with his adeptness in negotiating high-stakes partnerships, showcases his ability to drive strategic growth in some of Canada’s most important emerging sectors. His strategic business insights and legal acumen will give our clients opportunities to move into new spaces and enhance existing investments and developments. We’re all excited to work with him."
McCarthy Tétrault continues to execute on more infrastructure projects than any other law firm in Canada. Ranked among the world's best infrastructure practices, we adeptly execute on some of the largest and most significant projects in Canada and internationally. The firm provides clients with skilled, nationally integrated and multidisciplinary teams, experienced in project finance, procurement, zoning and planning, aboriginal, environmental, and other critical areas. Learn more about our Infrastructure expertise.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
